---
title: "Muireann Ryle"
image: me.png
about:
    template: solana
    image-shape: round
    image-width: 400px
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/muireann-ryle-2797242a0/
          target: _blank
        - icon: github
          text: GitHub
          href: https://github.com/muireann-ryle
          target: _blank
        - icon: envelope
          text: Email
          href: mailto:muireann.ryle2@mail.dcu.ie

---

I am currently pursuing a ***MSc in Business Analytics*** at Dublin City University where I 
am developing my understanding of **data analytics** and **business practice** through challenge
based learning projects. The course includes modules such as **Advanced Analytics Techniques**, 
**Business strategy**, and an **Applied Deep Learning Project**.

After graduating with a *First Class Honours* in BSc in Psychology and Mathematics, I decided
to continue my learning journey and broaden my knowledge in an area I am particularly interested
in, data analytics. Using tools such as **Python**, **SQL**, and **PowerBI**, I have been able to work on 
research projects on different business challenges and cases.

:::{.callout-note}
My current work is an Applied Deep Learning Project focused on developing a classifier for
hate speech in Portuguese tweets towards footballers!
:::
